reasons: Plan correctly identifies that implementation is already complete and focuses effort on test coverage — the right call given the git status shows compoundModes.ts and modeManager.ts changes already exist
All 7 acceptance criteria are mapped to specific test steps with clear test IDs
Low-tier fallback to empty compound array is tested explicitly (T-061-03), matching the ticket note about budget-aware degradation
GPU budget validation approach is sound: testing that 0.5x scaled layer sums don't exceed single-mode budget
Integration tests (step 5) verify real geometry systems work together, catching shader/WebGL issues that unit mocks would miss
Seeded selection tests (step 3) cover determinism and reachability of compound entries in rotation
concerns: The rotation order note (singles appended before compounds, not interleaved) is flagged as non-blocking but could produce predictable early-rotation patterns — acceptable for now since seed selects initial index across the full array

No explicit test for the crossfade duration/easing behavior with compound entries — the plan tests that transitions 'complete without error' but not that opacity interpolation is visually correct across both layers simultaneously. The existing crossfade tests likely cover this implicitly.
